en: Praise the LORD! Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good, for his steadfast love endures forever!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 你們要稱謝耶和華，因為他是美善的； 他的慈愛永遠長存。

en: Who can utter the mighty deeds of the LORD, or declare all his praise?
zh: 誰能述說耶和華大能的作為， 誰能說盡讚美他的話？

en: Blessed are they who observe justice, who do righteousness at all times!
zh: 謹守公正，常行公義的人， 都是有福的。

en: Remember me, O LORD, when you show favor to your people; help me when you save them,
zh: 耶和華啊！你恩待你子民的時候， 求你記念我； 你拯救他們的時候，求你眷念我；

en: that I may look upon the prosperity of your chosen ones, that I may rejoice in the gladness of your nation, that I may glory with your inheritance.
zh: 使我得見你選民的福樂， 因你國民的歡樂而歡樂， 與你的產業一同誇耀。

en: Both we and our fathers have sinned; we have committed iniquity; we have done wickedness.
zh: 我們和我們的列祖都犯了罪， 我們作了孽，也行了惡。

en: Our fathers, when they were in Egypt, did not consider your wondrous works; they did not remember the abundance of your steadfast love, but rebelled by the Sea, at the Red Sea.
zh: 我們的列祖在埃及的時候， 不明白你的奇事， 也不記念你豐盛的慈愛， 反倒在紅海的海邊悖逆了你。

en: Yet he saved them for his name's sake, that he might make known his mighty power.
zh: 但他因自己的名的緣故拯救他們， 為要彰顯他的大能。

en: He rebuked the Red Sea, and it became dry, and he led them through the deep as through a desert.
zh: 他斥責紅海，海就乾了； 他領他們走過海底，像經過曠野一樣。

en: So he saved them from the hand of the foe and redeemed them from the power of the enemy.
zh: 他拯救他們脫離憎恨他們的人的手， 從仇敵的手中救贖了他們。

en: And the waters covered their adversaries; not one of them was left.
zh: 海水淹沒了他們的敵人， 連一個也沒有留下。

en: Then they believed his words; they sang his praise.
zh: 那時他們才相信他的話， 唱歌讚美他。

en: But they soon forgot his works; they did not wait for his counsel.
zh: 可是他們很快就忘記了他的作為， 不仰望他的意旨，

en: But they had a wanton craving in the wilderness, and put God to the test in the desert;
zh: 反而在曠野大起貪慾， 在沙漠試探 神。

en: he gave them what they asked, but sent a wasting disease among them.
zh: 神把他們所求的賜給他們， 卻使災病臨到他們身上。

en: When men in the camp were jealous of Moses and Aaron, the holy one of the LORD,
zh: 他們在營中嫉妒摩西， 以及歸耶和華為聖的亞倫。

en: the earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.
zh: 於是地裂開，吞下了大坍， 把亞比蘭一夥的人也掩埋了。

en: Fire also broke out in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.
zh: 有火在他們的黨羽中燃燒起來， 烈燄焚毀了惡人。

en: They made a calf in Horeb and worshiped a metal image.
zh: 他們在何烈山做了牛犢， 敬拜鑄成的偶像。

en: They exchanged the glory of God for the image of an ox that eats grass.
zh: 這樣，他們用吃草的牛的像， 代替了他們的榮耀的 神。

en: They forgot God, their Savior, who had done great things in Egypt,
zh: 他們竟忘記了拯救他們的 神； 他曾在埃及行了大事，

en: wondrous works in the land of Ham, and awesome deeds by the Red Sea.
zh: 在含地行了奇事，在紅海邊行了可畏可懼的事。

en: Therefore he said he would destroy them- had not Moses, his chosen one, stood in the breach before him, to turn away his wrath from destroying them.
zh: 所以他說要滅絕他們， 不是有他揀選的摩西， 在他面前站在破口上， 使他的怒氣轉消，恐怕他早已毀滅他們了。

en: Then they despised the pleasant land, having no faith in his promise.
zh: 他們又輕視那美地， 不信他的應許。

en: They murmured in their tents, and did not obey the voice of the LORD.
zh: 他們在自己的帳棚裡發怨言， 不聽從耶和華的話。

en: Therefore he raised his hand and swore to them that he would make them fall in the wilderness,
zh: 所以他對他們起誓， 必使他們倒在曠野，

en: and would make their offspring fall among the nations, scattering them among the lands.
zh: 使他們的後裔四散在萬國中， 使他們分散在各地。

en: Then they yoked themselves to the Baal of Peor, and ate sacrifices offered to the dead;
zh: 他們又歸附巴力．毘珥， 吃了祭過死神的祭物。

en: they provoked the LORD to anger with their deeds, and a plague broke out among them.
zh: 他們的行為觸怒了耶和華， 於是有瘟疫在他們中間發生。

en: Then Phinehas stood up and intervened, and the plague was stayed.
zh: 那時非尼哈站起來，執行刑罰， 瘟疫才止息。

en: And that was counted to him as righteousness from generation to generation forever.
zh: 這就算為他的義， 世世代代直到永遠。

en: They angered him at the waters of Meribah, and it went ill with Moses on their account,
zh: 他們在米利巴水邊惹耶和華發怒， 以致摩西因他們的緣故也受了懲罰。

en: for they made his spirit bitter, and he spoke rashly with his lips.
zh: 因為他們抗拒 神的靈 ， 摩西用嘴說出冒失的話。

en: They did not destroy the peoples, as the LORD commanded them,
zh: 他們沒有照著耶和華吩咐他們的， 滅絕外族的人民，

en: but they mixed with the nations and learned to do as they did.
zh: 反而和外族人混居雜處， 學習他們的風俗習慣。

en: They served their idols, which became a snare to them.
zh: 他們又事奉外族人的偶像， 這就成了他們的網羅。

en: They sacrificed their sons and their daughters to the demons;
zh: 他們把自己的兒女祭祀鬼魔。

en: they poured out innocent blood, the blood of their sons and daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan, and the land was polluted with blood.
zh: 他們流了無辜人的血， 就是他們自己兒女的血， 把他們祭祀迦南的偶像； 那地就被血污穢了。

en: Thus they became unclean by their acts, and played the whore in their deeds.
zh: 這樣，他們因自己所作的成了不潔， 他們的行為使他們犯了邪淫。

en: Then the anger of the LORD was kindled against his people, and he abhorred his heritage;
zh: 所以耶和華的怒氣向他的子民發作； 他厭惡自己的產業，

en: he gave them into the hand of the nations, so that those who hated them ruled over them.
zh: 把他們交在外族人的手裡， 恨惡他們的人就管轄他們。

en: Their enemies oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their power.
zh: 他們的仇敵壓迫他們， 他們就屈服在仇敵的手下。

en: Many times he delivered them, but they were rebellious in their purposes and were brought low through their iniquity.
zh: 神曾多次搭救他們， 他們卻故意悖逆， 以致因自己的罪孽降為卑微。

en: Nevertheless, he looked upon their distress, when he heard their cry.
zh: 可是他聽到了他們哀叫的時候， 就垂顧他們的苦難。

en: For their sake he remembered his covenant, and relented according to the abundance of his steadfast love.
zh: 他為他們的緣故記念他自己的約， 照著他豐盛的慈愛回心轉意。

en: He caused them to be pitied by all those who held them captive.
zh: 他又使他們在所有擄掠他們的人面前， 得蒙憐恤。

en: Save us, O LORD our God, and gather us from among the nations, that we may give thanks to your holy name and glory in your praise.
zh: 耶和華我們的 神啊！求你拯救我們， 把我們從萬國中招聚回來， 我們好稱謝你的聖名， 以讚美你為誇耀。

en: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting! And let all the people say, "Amen!" Praise the LORD!
zh: 耶和華以色列的 神是應當稱頌的， 從永遠到永遠。 願眾民都說：“阿們。” 你們要讚美耶和華。
